title: Supply Chain Headwinds Continue to Pressure Online Car Marketplaces
text: When the chips are down, or at least in short supply, the connected economy suffers, at least a bit. It's well known that chips have made newer automobiles harder to come by, and so that's given a tailwind to used vehicle purchases.
